div.p: This library defines encounter-based elements used throughout the Immunization CPG

tr.th: Date of Latest Live Attenuated Vaccine
Client's age is less than 6 months
Client's age is between 6 months and 9 months
Client's age is less than 9 months
Client's age is more than or equal to 9 months
Client's age is less than 12 months
Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months
Client's age is less than 15 months
Client's age is more than or equal to 15 months
Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
Live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks
No live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks

description.value: This library defines encounter-based elements used throughout the Immunization CPG

name.value: Date of Latest Live Attenuated Vaccine
Client's age is less than 6 months
Client's age is between 6 months and 9 months
Client's age is less than 9 months
Client's age is more than or equal to 9 months
Client's age is less than 12 months
Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months
Client's age is less than 15 months
Client's age is more than or equal to 15 months
Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks
Live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks
No live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks
